name: DevCycle
description: DevCycle MCP server for feature flag management
longDescription: DevCycle MCP server for feature flag management. List, create, update, and delete features and variables. Manage targeting rules, SDK installation, self-targeting overrides, and access feature evaluation analytics.
author: com.devcycle
examplePrompts: List all feature flags in my project
Create a new feature flag for dark mode
Show me the targeting rules for this feature
What's the evaluation count for this feature?
Install the DevCycle SDK for my project
